member.summary: It contains the information of a DffToken.

member.returns: True in case DffToken value updated correctly, otherwise returns false.

member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether gets or sets DuplicatedCompareValues.

File handler to be set.>

member.summary: Main file handler implementation. For basic file IO operations.

member.summary: File handling interfaces. Usage of FileService is preferred.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.MixingDetection.PrimeMixingDetectionTestMethod
member.summary: Dummy description of this test method.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.MixingDetection.PrimeMixingDetectionTestMethod.ConfigurationFilePath
member.summary: Gets or sets configuration file path.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MixingDetection.PrimeMixingDetectionTestMethod.VerifyDffTokenFormat(System.String)
member.summary: Verify if the dffTokenStructure is correct. A ddf token structure should have three parts: [SSID]:[Dff Optype]:[Token name].

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MixingDetection.PrimeMixingDetectionTestMethod.IsSchemaValidationEnabled
member.summary: Returns if the schema validation should be processed for the configuration files handled by Aleph. By default schema validation is disabled. But if IsSysCFileServiceUp = False (not a VPO or Production) the validation is enabled automatically. This is to avoid the user to be aware of enabling the validation for local/eng runs or forget to set to False the parameter in a production TP to save init time.
member.returns: True is schema validation for configuration files should be executed.
